name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual processes cause delayed financial reporting. We automate routine financial close and reporting instead of manual spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Delayed financial reporting due to manual processes
